reason: Changing file permissions on user initialization files to 0740 is a standard STIG hardening step that does not affect system boot, networking, or authentication mechanisms. The fix is reversible and unlikely to lock out SSH or console access. The only impact is a potential reduction of group/other read access to those files, which is acceptable under the policy.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Reducing group/other read permissions may affect scripts that expect broader access; Running the script across many home directories could miss custom locations if the regex is incomplete
